name: The Orchestrator
effect: Segment audiences into meaningful cohorts and orchestrate personalized journeys through automated decisioning. This card is considered intelligent.

clauses.name: SEGMENTATION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If an audience exists: It is divided into no fewer than twelve segments, seven of which will never receive a message.

clauses.name: DECISIONING EFFECT
clauses.rule: When a decision is required: A rule written in Q2 of the prior fiscal year is applied.

clauses.name: ORCHESTRATION OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If all segments are active simultaneously: One stakeholder adds a thirteenth segment mid-flight and the decisioning engine is considered rearchitected.

witness_quote: It decides which journey they're on.
image_sign_text: RIGHT MESSAGE. RIGHT PERSON. RIGHT NOW.
